hooks.command: if command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then python3 "$PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/adaptive-ui-s/scripts/check_update.py" --hook; elif command -v python >/dev/null 2>&1; then python "$PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/adaptive-ui-s/scripts/check_update.py" --hook; fi
hooks.commandWindows: $py = Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($py) { & py -3 "$env:PLUGIN_ROOT\skills\adaptive-ui-s\scripts\check_update.py" --hook } elseif (Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { & python "$env:PLUGIN_ROOT\skills\adaptive-ui-s\scripts\check_update.py" --hook }
